query:
-- Check customers table for all 8 names
SELECT externalId, name FROM customers
WHERE name LIKE '%Spicers%' OR name LIKE '%Air Restore%' OR name LIKE '%Salter%'
   OR name LIKE '%Wineology%' OR name LIKE '%Gateway%' OR name LIKE '%CPM%'
ORDER BY name;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute

WHERE name LIKE '%Spicers%' OR name LIKE '%Air Restore%' OR name LIKE '%Salter%'
   OR name LIKE '%Wineology%' OR name LIKE '%Gateway%' OR name LIKE '%CPM%'
